visual_description: META Showdown formation screen with Fleet 1 selected. Shows 6 ships: Main fleet (3 ships) and Vanguard (3 ships). Auto Combat is ON. Battle button visible for META Showdown.
note: Pre-battle formation for META boss fight

visual_description: Same formation screen, ships animating/idle. Fleet power 17095 visible. Targets: Defeat all enemies, All ships must survive, Finish in 120 seconds.
Loading screen with artwork. Loading tip: 'Use your carrier's air support to clear the screen of all enemy shells!' Progress: 8.81%.
note: Battle loading screen entering META fight

visual_description: Same loading screen, progress advanced to 83.94%. Artwork shows character painting with brush.
Battle in progress against Algérie META Lv.126. Boss HP bar at top. Timer 01:17 remaining. Manual mode active. Boss using blue energy attacks.
note: META battle started, boss at x100 health bars

visual_description: Battle continues. Skill activation: 'Ruinous Blade of the Slayer'. Boss health at x94 bars. Damage numbers visible. Ships using various skills.
Battle continues. Boss at x92 health. Large boss attack animation with winged creature visible. Timer 01:01. Skill cut-in showing character on couch.
Battle continues. Boss at x92. Skill activation 'Expurgating Flame'. Heavy damage numbers (58536, 59054). Roses visible as attack effects.
Battle continues. Boss at x88. Multiple skill activations visible: 'Ruinous Blade of the Slayer', 'Bunbun Strikers', 'Attack Command: Holy Judgment'. Heavy damage dealt.
Battle continues. Boss at x86. Timer 00:59. More skills activated including 'All Out Assault II'. Damage numbers flying (4144, 2003, 64, etc).
Battle continues. Boss at x74. Timer 00:53. Skill activation 'All Out Assault II' with aircraft carrier planes. Large damage numbers (1316, 16930, 139420).
Battle continues. Boss at x68. Timer 00:48. Skills: 'Ruinous Blade of the Slayer', 'All Out Assault III', 'Expurgating Flame'. Heavy pink/purple particle effects.
Battle continues. Boss at x66. Timer 00:44. Full-screen skill cut-in showing masked character with plate. Large blue wolf/creature visible.
Battle continues. Boss at x57. Timer 00:36. Skills: 'Operation Rainbow+'. Heavy laser/beam attacks with yellow/orange projectiles.
note: Late stage combat with beam attacks

visual_description: Battle continues. Boss at x55. Timer 00:31. Full-screen cut-in of character with ears sitting on chair. Heavy bullet patterns on screen.
Battle continues. Boss at x41. Timer 00:21. Multiple skills: 'All Out Assault II', 'Max Voltage!', 'Expurgating Flame', 'Worldgorging Lionflame'. White feather effects.
note: Final push with multiple ultimate skills

visual_description: Battle continues. Boss at x32. Timer 00:12. Skills: 'All Out Assault II', 'Expurgating Flame'. Heavy pink projectile patterns.
Battle continues. Boss at x16. Timer 00:01 (nearly time over). Large blue energy wolf creature attacking with black roses.
COMBAT FINISHED screen. Total damage: 1,237,683. Damage breakdown per ship shown. Character dialogue: 'Gah... I couldn't... This isn't my fault...' Confirm button visible.
DOSSIER ANALYSIS screen for Algérie META Level 15. HP: 262317/1500000. DMG RANK tab selected. Player 'Kruzer' rank 1 with 1,237,683 damage. Rewards list shows Synchrotron.
Same DOSSIER ANALYSIS screen, stable view. Algérie META Level 15. Time left 23:57:44. Auto-Deploy button visible with 00:15:00 timer.
Auto-Deploy dialog opened. Shows Maximum damage: 1,237,683. Prediction: 1 attempt, 40 oil cost, 15MIN time required. Cancel and Start buttons visible.
Dossier Analysis with 'In Progress...' overlay. Auto-Deploy timer shows 00:15:00 counting down. Screen dimmed with progress indicator.
Loading screen with new artwork. Tip: 'Light Cruisers have relatively high Anti-Air defenses.' Progress 62.61%. Different character artwork (white/silver hair).
Battle against Lv.114 Wichita ELITE enemy. Timer 02:49. Different ship fleet composition visible. Skills: 'Hot-and-Cold Armaments'.
note: Regular map battle, different from META

visual_description: Battle continues. Skills: 'Musashi's Guardianship', 'From Advantage Seized, Victory Bequeathed'. Heavy golden/yellow explosion effects. Timer 02:42.
note: Elite battle with heavy skill usage

visual_description: Battle continues. Aircraft visible attacking. Various damage numbers. Timer 02:39. Multiple shipgirls on screen using abilities.
Total Rewards screen showing loot: cubes, tech boxes, coins (x1250), food items, skill books. Tactical EXP gain shown (+176). Exit button at bottom.
Operation Siren map: Caribbean Sea A - Safe Zone. Fleet 1 chibi character visible on grid. Resources shown: 228/231/215. Daily 145/200. Supporting 2/7. Order/Fleet/Scan buttons visible.
note: Back to OS map after battle completion

visual_description: Same OS map view, Fleet 1 stationary on yellow grid. Storage/Information/Overview buttons at bottom. Safe zone indicated.
OS map Caribbean Sea A - Safe Zone. Fleet 1 on grid with resources 228/231/215. Fleet composition visible on left. Radar/Order/Fleet/Scan controls on right.
note: OS map stable state, navigation ready

visual_description: Announcements popup showing Patch Note for 3/19 Update. Event tab selected. Project Identity Update details visible. New Outfits notification also shown.
Main screen with secretary ship (Enterprise skin with umbrella). Player name Kruzer, Level 143. Resources: 18998 oil, 53159 coins, 4593 gems. Menu: Shop, Dock, Depot, HQ, Lab, Missions, Build, Guild.
Black screen with developer logos: YONGSHI, MANJUU, YOSTAR. Game restart sequence.
Title screen with artwork of Enterprise. Azur Lane logo. Social media links (Twitter, Facebook, Yostar). Press to Start text. Version 9.2.414.
Same title screen with PRESS TO START visible. Settings gear icon top right. CRIWARE logo bottom right.
Main screen with secretary ship (Enterprise skin). Same player info Kruzer Lv.143. Resources updated: 18998 oil, 53159 coins, 4593 gems. Event banners visible.
note: Back to main screen after restart

visual_description: Main screen with different secretary ship (Baltimore with raccoon hoodie). Same player Kruzer Lv.143. Resources: 18998 oil, 57201 coins, 4593 gems. Formation and Battle buttons visible.
note: Main screen with different secretary ship

visual_description: Loading screen with Halloween-themed artwork. Two characters in costumes. Loading tip: 'Identical skills don't stack. Higher level skills have priority.' Progress 9.61%.
Exercise/PvP battle. Attacker Kruzer (Lv.143) vs Defender Sgt K66 (Lv.140). Skills activating: 'Upon the Wind's Edge', 'Marvel of the Hegemony - Seydlitz'. Full-screen skill cut-ins visible.
Exercise battle continues. Timer 04:50. Skills: 'All Out Assault II', 'Jöttun's Jaws', 'Worldgorging Lionflame'. Heavy combat effects with damage numbers.
note: PvP battle with heavy skill exchanges
